info.title: BookNest Library API
info.description: Full-featured Library API with Dynamic Permissions, Redis Caching & Dual Uploads.

get.description:
Fetches the profile of the currently logged-in user.
✅ FIXED: Forces loading of Role AND Permissions from Database.

put.description: Updates the user's own profile (Full Name only).

post.description: Changes the current user's password.

get.description: Fetches books issued to the current user.

schema.title: Response Get My Issued Books Api Profile Issued Books  Get

post.description:
Creates a new user account.
Checks for duplicate Email/Username and ensures Role exists.

get.description:
Fetches a list of all active users.
Allowed for Book Issuers (to select client) and Admins.

schema.title: Response Read Users Api Users  Get

put.description:
Updates a user's details.
Includes safety checks for Super Admin.

delete.description:
Soft deletes a user. 
Prevents deleting Self or Super Admin.

get.description: Fetches a list of all active user roles with their permissions.

schema.title: Response Get Roles Api Roles  Get

get.description: Fetches details for a single active role by ID with permissions.

put.description:
Updates the permissions assigned to a specific role.
Expects JSON body: { "permission_ids": [1, 2, 3] }

get.description: Fetch all permissions.

schema.title: Response Get All Permissions Api Permissions Permissions Get

post.description: Create a new permission.

get.description: Fetch all roles.

schema.title: Response Get All Roles Api Permissions Roles Get

post.description: Create a new role.

get.description: Get single role details.

post.description: Assign permissions to role.
Creates a new category.

get.description: Fetches a list of all non-deleted categories.

schema.title: Response Read Categories Api Categories  Get

get.description: Fetches a specific non-deleted category by ID.

post.description: Creates a new subcategory under a parent category.

get.description: Fetches a list of all non-deleted subcategories, including their parent category.

schema.title: Response Read Subcategories Api Subcategories  Get

get.description: Fetches details of a specific non-deleted subcategory by ID.

post.description: Creates a new language.

get.description: Fetches a list of all languages.

schema.title: Response Read Languages Api Languages  Get

get.description: Fetches details of a specific language by ID.

post.description: Creates a new physical location for storing books.

get.description: Fetches a list of all defined locations.

schema.title: Response Get All Locations Api Locations  Get

get.description: Fetches details of a specific location by ID.

post.description:
Create a new physical copy of a book.
Requires BOOK_MANAGE permission.

get.description: Get list of all book copies.

schema.title: Response Get All Book Copies Api Copies  Get

get.description: Get details of a specific copy.

post.description: Book cover image upload karta hai aur Cloudinary URL return karta hai.
Book PDF upload karta hai aur Cloudinary URL return karta hai.

get.description: Get list of all issued books (Active & Returned).

schema.title: Response Get All Issues Api Issues  Get

post.description: Issues a book copy to a user.
Returns a book and marks copy as Available.
Staff: Jab nayi book upload karein, to approval request banayein.

get.description: Admin View: List all book approval requests.

schema.title: Response Get All Upload Requests Api Requests Upload Get

put.description:
Admin Action: Approve or Reject a book.
✅ FIXED: Updates 'is_approved' flag in Book table correctly.

post.description: User requests to read/borrow a restricted book.

get.description: Get logged-in user's requests history

schema.title: Response Get My Access Requests Api Requests Access My Requests Get

get.description: Admin View: See all borrow requests from users

schema.title: Response Get All Access Requests Api Requests Access All Get

post.description: Submits a new request or updates an existing one.

get.description: Returns status for a specific book.

Fetches all requests for the logged-in user.
Uses Outer Join so deleted books still show up in history.

schema.title: Response Get My Requests Api Restricted Requests My Requests Get

get.description: Admin Only: List all requests.

schema.title: Response Get All Access Requests Api Restricted Requests List Get

post.description: Ek specific book ki permission kisi user ya role ko assign karein.

get.description: Ek book ke liye sabhi permissions dekhein.

schema.title: Response Get Permissions For Book Api Book Permissions Book  Book Id  Get

delete.description: Ek book permission ko revoke karein.

post.description: Log karein jab koi user ek digital book access karta hai.

get.description: Ek specific user ki digital access history dekhein.

schema.title: Response Get User Digital Access History Api Digital Access User  Client Id  Get

get.description:
✅ System logs list
Filters:
- user_id (action_by_id)
- action_type
- target_type
Pagination:
- skip, limit

schema.title: Response Get Logs Api Logs  Get

post.description:
Public Registration:
- Koi bhi naya user yahan account bana sakta hai.
- Token ki zaroorat nahi hai.
- Default Role 'Member' milega.

schema.title: Response Read Books Api Books  Get
Response Get Public Posts Api Posts Public Get
